title: Projecting Material Extraction under the MERCOSUR-EU Trade Agreement — Replication Materials

creators.name: Gómez, Raimundo Elías
creators.affiliation: National Scientific and Technical Research Council (CONICET), Argentina; Institute of Sociology, University of Porto, Portugal

description: Replication materials (data, analysis scripts, and figures) for the article 'Projecting material extraction under the MERCOSUR-EU trade agreement'. Includes Non-negative Tensor Factorisation (NTF) of material extraction patterns from the GLORIA MRIO database (Loop060) for 31 countries (EU-27 and MERCOSUR-4), scenario projections under the trade agreement, and all publication figures.
